fix_decisions.claim_text: runner/harness source emits 'could not allocate workflow-flight-recorder workspace'
fix_decisions.evidence: the string is emitted by the sourced module (lib/test/modules/workflow-flight-recorder.sh:61), captured into the runner's log and echoed on the runner's stdout at runtime; the shadow verifier itself confirmed every runtime behavior correct and failed only the claim's source-file attribution — the code is right, the generated claim misattributed the emitter

fix_decisions.claim_text: reject unknown registry mapping keys; split/annotate the shared schema_version
fix_decisions.evidence: future-drift design notes, not current defects: unknown keys are tolerated by explicit .get() extraction (description rides along by design) and both subsystems validate disjoint subtrees today; a schema split is a separate design decision

fix_decisions.claim_text: assert floor == actual count; test sanitize_result_field TSV fields
fix_decisions.evidence: disclosed-by-design lower bound (key is named minimum_assertions); tight-guard preservation and sanitizer micro-tests are nice-to-have coverage, not defects
